articles.title: Hantavirus live updates: MV Hondius arrives off the coast of Tenerife - ABC7 Chicago
articles.description: Teams will bring back Americans to the National Quarantine Unit in Nebraska.
articles.content:
A CDC official said Saturday the federal government doesn't plan to have the repatriated American cruise ship passengers quarantine upon arrival in Nebraska.
